tagline: Building intelligent, scalable, and impactful digital solutions.
description: Full Stack Developer & AI Automation Enthusiast — crafting modern web applications, agentic AI workflows, and scalable systems that solve real-world challenges.
bio:
Hi, I'm Dharshan Kumar — a Full Stack Developer & AI Automation Enthusiast passionate about building intelligent and scalable digital solutions.

I specialize in developing modern web applications using React, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB, while exploring Agentic AI, GenAI tools, and workflow automation to create impactful software products.

I enjoy solving real-world problems through clean code, automation, and innovative technology.

bullets: Maintaining a CGPA of 8.47 with strong fundamentals in computer science and software engineering.
Completed Odoo Certification in ERP modules, customization, and business workflow automation (December 2025).
Active participant in hackathons — secured 1st Place at KEC Techno Fest and 3rd Place at KEC Cybot Hackathon.
experience.desc: Pursuing B.Sc in Information Systems with focus on full-stack development, AI automation, and ERP systems. CGPA: 8.47.

bullets: Won 1st Place at Xenovex Xhackathon, Chennai — demonstrating end-to-end agentic AI prototyping skills.
Built Zenovex, an agentic AI travel assistant using n8n with multi-step automated decision workflows for dynamic itinerary generation.
Secured 3rd Place at KEC Cybot Hackathon in the AI/Robotics category (February 2026).
experience.desc: Won multiple hackathons building agentic AI solutions. 1st Place at Xenovex Xhackathon Chennai and KEC Techno Fest. 3rd Place at KEC Cybot Hackathon.

bullets: Odoo Certification — ERP modules, customization, and business workflow automation (Kongu Engineering College, December 2025).
AI & GenAI Exploration — Hands-on exploration of LangChain, OpenAI APIs, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) concepts.
Workflow Automation — Hands-on experience with n8n for low-code agentic pipelines, API chaining, and automated communication workflows.
experience.desc: Certified in Odoo ERP. Exploring LangChain, OpenAI APIs, RAG systems, and n8n workflow automation for agentic system design.

projects.title: Zenovex
projects.subtitle: Agentic AI Travel Assistant
projects.desc: Built an agentic AI travel assistant using n8n with multi-step automated decision workflows for dynamic itinerary generation. Integrated WhatsApp & email APIs for real-time user communication, designed AI-driven decision nodes for adaptive recommendations, and won 1st Place at Xenovex Xhackathon Chennai.

projects.title: Rulyn
projects.subtitle: Gamified STEM Learning Platform
projects.desc: Built a full-stack offline-first LMS using the MERN stack with dual Student/Teacher modules, supporting 7+ interactive STEM game modes with JWT-based role access control, real-time Socket.io progress tracking, and a gamification engine with XP points, badge unlocks, and leaderboards.

projects.title: Fitlee
projects.subtitle: AI-Integrated Gym Management
projects.desc: Built an AI-integrated gym management platform with secure login, membership plan management, and trainer scheduling. Integrated an AI chatbot for automated member query resolution, reducing manual support effort. Designed RESTful APIs across membership, trainer, and booking modules.

projects.title: SecureShare
projects.subtitle: File Sharing & Threat Monitoring
projects.desc: Built a secure file-sharing system with role-based access control (RBAC) and audit logging. Implemented basic threat monitoring and anomaly detection for unauthorized access attempts using Node.js and Python.

publications.title: 1st Place — Xenovex Xhackathon, Chennai
publications.desc: Won 1st Place for building Zenovex, an Agentic AI Travel Automation system demonstrating end-to-end agentic AI prototyping skills using n8n and WhatsApp API integration.

publications.title: 1st Place — KEC Techno Fest
publications.desc: Secured 1st Place at Kongu Engineering College Techno Fest, showcasing innovative full-stack development and problem-solving skills in a competitive environment.

publications.title: 3rd Place — KEC Cybot Hackathon (AI/Robotics)
publications.desc: Secured 3rd Place in the AI/Robotics category at KEC Cybot Hackathon, building intelligent solutions that combine AI with real-world automation challenges.

publications.title: Odoo ERP Certification — Kongu Engineering College
publications.desc: Completed training in Odoo ERP modules, customization, and business workflow automation. Directly relevant to SaaS, procurement operations, and enterprise system design.
